changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE organization_integration_data_json ( id serial, organization_id integer NOT NULL, code varchar(64) DEFAULT null, scope varchar(64) DEFAULT null, integration_entities jsonb DEFAULT NULL, created_at timestamp NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT pk_organization_integration_data_json PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_organization_integration_data_json_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE ); CREATE INDEX i_organization_integration_data_json_organization ON organization_integration_data_json (organization_id);
